mapper.sql: message_id, queue_name, exchange_name, routing_key, message_content, status, retry_count, create_time, update_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE local_message
queue_name = #{bean.queueName},
exchange_name = #{bean.exchangeName},
routing_key = #{bean.routingKey},
message_content = #{bean.messageContent},
status = #{bean.status},
retry_count = #{bean.retryCount},
create_time = #{bean.createTime},
update_time = #{bean.updateTime},
WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM local_message WHERE (status = 0 OR status = 2) AND retry_count < #{maxRetry} AND update_time < date_sub(now(), interval 10 second)
